allow: Bash(node -e "const lu = require\('./node_modules/react-icons/lu/index.js'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lu\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('home'\)\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import * as lu from './node_modules/react-icons/lu/index.js'; const keys = Object.keys\(lu\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('home'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(keys\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import * as hi from './node_modules/react-icons/hi2/index.js'; const keys = Object.keys\(hi\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('home'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(keys.slice\(0,10\)\)\)")
